---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill, workflow, or diagnose pattern
title: "[skill] "
labels: ["skill wanted"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed skill or workflow.

## Target scenario

What training or AI infra workflow does this address?

## Why it is useful

Why should this live in MindSpore Skills?

## Inputs

What information or artifacts would the skill need?

## Expected outputs

What should the skill produce?

## Validation

How should the behavior be checked?

## Related skills or commands

Does this connect to existing skills, commands, or docs?

## Additional notes

Anything else maintainers should know.
